ns0:entry.ns0:title: JHDev2006/Super-Mario-Bros.-Remastered-Public
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JHDev2006/Super-Mario-Bros.-Remastered-Public
Language: gdscript
A Remake / Celebration of the original 'Super Mario Bros.' games. Features new levels, custom modes, new characters, alongside a full level editor / custom level system!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Maaack/Godot-Game-Template
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Maaack/Godot-Game-Template
Language: gdscript
Godot template with a main menu, options menus, pause menu, credits, scene loader, extra tools, and an example game scene.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Open-Industry-Project/Open-Industry-Project
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Open-Industry-Project/Open-Industry-Project
Language: gdscript
Free and Open-source warehouse/manufacturing development framework and simulator

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Orama-Interactive/Pixelorama
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Orama-Interactive/Pixelorama
Language: gdscript
Unleash your creativity with Pixelorama, a powerful and accessible open-source pixel art multitool. Whether you want to create sprites, tiles, animations, or just express yourself in the language of pixel art, this software will realize your pixel-perfect dreams with a vast toolbox of features. Available on Windows, Linux, macOS and the Web!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Rhythia/sound-space-plus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Rhythia/sound-space-plus
Language: gdscript
[Old Rhythia, now unmaintained] Rhythm-based aim game

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TheDuckCow/godot-road-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TheDuckCow/godot-road-generator
Language: gdscript
A Godot plugin for creating 3D highways/streets and lane-following traffic

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitbrain/beehave
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitbrain/beehave
Language: gdscript
🐝 behavior tree AI for Godot Engine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitwes/Gut
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitwes/Gut
Language: gdscript
Godot Unit Test. Unit testing tool for Godot Game Engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dialogic-godot/dialogic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dialogic-godot/dialogic
Language: gdscript
💬 Create Dialogs, Visual Novels, RPGs, and manage Characters with Godot to create your Game!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: foxssake/netfox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/foxssake/netfox
Language: gdscript
Addons for building multiplayer games with Godot

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hi-godot/godot-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hi-godot/godot-ai
Language: gdscript
Production-grade MCP server and AI tools for the Godot engine. A Snap to install. Totally free and fun.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nathanhoad/godot_dialogue_manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nathanhoad/godot_dialogue_manager
Language: gdscript
A powerful nonlinear dialogue system for Godot

ns0:entry.ns0:title: youichi-uda/godot-mcp-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/youichi-uda/godot-mcp-pro
Language: gdscript
162 MCP tools for AI-powered Godot 4 development. Scene, animation, 3D, physics, particles, audio, shader, input simulation, runtime analysis, navigation, testing & more. $15 one-time.
